author: lunerfox
description: Render live, auto-refreshing Gitea issue cards in your notes and create issues without leaving the editor. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: lunerfox
manifest.description: Render live, auto-refreshing Gitea issue cards in your notes and create issues without leaving the editor.
manifest.name: Gitea Cards

name: Gitea Cards

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 0.40.0

**Fixes**
- Tighten the mobile search-table layout so result cards fit narrow screens

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 0.39.0 — Image support

**New**
- Render images inline in comment threads, with an authenticated image loader
- Optional **card attachment strip** (off by default) showing an issue's image attachments
- **Attach images** when creating a new issue and in the comment quick-action
- **Paste screenshots** from the clipboard straight into the New issue modal
- Multipart upload helper for issue/comment assets

**Fixes**
- Graph view: milestone and title are now clickable links
- Graph view: error on an unknown milestone instead of silently showing all issues

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial public release of Gitea Cards — render live, auto-refreshing Gitea issue cards in your notes and create issues without leaving the editor.
